content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_LandedCost
-- drop view v_LandedCost
as
SELECT          'PO' as [MO or PO]
,               POH.PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               POH.ORTY AS [Order Type]
,               POL.PUSL AS [Order Low Status]
,               POL.PUST AS [Order High Status]
,               POL.PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               POL.PNLS AS [Order Line Sub Number]
,               POL.SUDO AS [Container Number]
,               REPN AS [Receiving Number]
,               CEID AS [Costing Element]
,               SUM(RVQA) as [Received Qty]
,               SUM(ORQA) as [Open Qty]
,               SUM(RCAC) AS [Received Cost Amount]
,               POL.PUPR AS [Unit Price]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Number]
,               IM.[Description]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Description]
,               IM.Subcategory
,               IM.Category
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Manufactured or Purchased] as [Procurement Type]
,               IM.Status
,               IM.[FOB Cost] as [Estimated FOB]
,               IM.[Origin Port to Warehouse Rate] as [Estimated Ocean]
,               IM.[Estimated Landed Cost] as [Estimated Landed]
,               cast(cast(NULLIF(POL.RCDT,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Received Date]
,               POH.PUDT as [Order Date]
,               POL.CSNO AS [HTS Code]
,               POL.ORCO AS [Country]
,               POL.WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,               IM.Weight AS [Weight]
,               POH.SUNO AS [Supplier Number]
,               SU.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
JOIN            M3.CIDMAS SU ON POH.SUNO = SU.SUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.FGRPCL PCL ON POH.PUNO = PCL.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = PCL.PNLI AND POL.PNLS = PCL.PNLS
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM ON POL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           1=1
AND             POH.ORTY <> ('C01')
AND             CEID NOT IN ('SLSTAX', 'CREDIT')
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO, POH.ORTY, POL.PNLI, POL.PNLS, POL.SUDO, REPN, CEID, POL.PUPR, ITM.ITNO
,               POL.CSNO, POL.ORCO, POL.WHLO, IM.Weight, IM.[Aligned Item Number], IM.[Description]
,               IM.Subcategory, IM.Category, IM.[Product Line], IM.[Sub-Brand], IM.Brand, IM.[Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit], IM.Division, [Item Type], [Manufactured or Purchased], Status, [FOB Cost]
,               [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate], [Estimated Landed Cost], [Aligned Item Description]
,               POL.PUSL, POL.PUST, POH.PUDT, POH.SUNO, SU.SUNM, POL.RCDT, POH.PUDT

UNION ALL

SELECT          'PO' as [MO or PO]
,               POH.PUNO AS [Order Number]
,               POH.ORTY AS [Order Type]
,               POL.PUSL AS [Order Low Status]
,               POL.PUST AS [Order High Status]
,               POL.PNLI AS [Order Line Number]
,               POL.PNLS AS [Order Line Sub Number]
,               POL.SUDO AS [Container Number]
,               NULL AS [Receiving Number]
,               'FOB' AS [Costing Element]
,               SUM(RVQA) as [Received Qty]
,               SUM(ORQA) as [Open Qty]
,               SUM(RVQA*POL.PUPR) AS [Received Cost Amount]
,               POL.PUPR AS [Unit Price]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Number]
,               IM.[Description]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Description]
,               IM.Subcategory
,               IM.Category
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Manufactured or Purchased] as [Procurement Type]
,               IM.Status
,               IM.[FOB Cost] as [Estimated FOB]
,               IM.[Origin Port to Warehouse Rate] as [Estimated Ocean]
,               IM.[Estimated Landed Cost] as [Estimated Landed]
,               cast(cast(NULLIF(POL.RCDT,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Received Date]
,               POH.PUDT as [Order Date]
,               POL.CSNO AS [HTS Code]
,               POL.ORCO AS [Country]
,               POL.WHLO AS [Warehouse]
,               IM.Weight AS [Weight]
,               POH.SUNO AS [Supplier Number]
,               SU.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3.MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
JOIN            M3.CIDMAS SU ON POH.SUNO = SU.SUNO
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM ON POL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE           1=1
AND             POH.ORTY <> ('C01')
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO, POH.ORTY, POL.PNLI, POL.PNLS, POL.SUDO, POL.PUPR, ITM.ITNO
,               POL.CSNO, POL.ORCO, POL.WHLO, IM.Weight, IM.[Aligned Item Number], IM.[Description]
,               IM.Subcategory, IM.Category, IM.[Product Line], IM.[Sub-Brand], IM.Brand, IM.[Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit], IM.Division, [Item Type], [Manufactured or Purchased], Status, [FOB Cost]
,               [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate], [Estimated Landed Cost], [Aligned Item Description]
,               POL.PUSL, POL.PUST, POH.PUDT, POH.SUNO, SU.SUNM, POL.RCDT, POH.PUDT






--select * from v_LandedCost where [Order Number] = '1001291'

/*

UNION ALL

SELECT          'MO' as [MO or PO]
,               RIDN as [Order Number]
,               NULL as [Order Type]
,               NULL as [Order Low Status]
,               NULL as [Order High Status]
,               RIDL as [Order Line Number]
,               RIDX as [Order Line Sub Number]
,               NULL as [Container Number]
,               NULL as [Receiving Number]
,               '01' as [Sequence Number]
,               'FOB' as [Costing Element]
,               'Received' as [Receipt Flag]
,               SUM(TRQT*TRPR) AS [Received Cost Amount]
,               TRPR as [Unit Price]
,               SUM(TRQT) as [Qty]
,               MT.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Number]
,               IM.[Description]
,               IM.[Aligned Item Description]
,               IM.Subcategory
,               IM.Category
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit]
,               IM.Division
,               IM.[Item Type]
,               IM.[Manufactured or Purchased] as [Procurement Type]
,               IM.Status
,               IM.[FOB Cost] as [Estimated FOB]
,               IM.[Origin Port to Warehouse Rate] as [Estimated Ocean]
,               IM.[Estimated Landed Cost] as [Estimated Landed]
,               MT.TRDT as [Date]
,               NULL as [HTS Code]
,               NULL as [Country]
,               MT.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,               IM.Weight
,               'TLC' as [Supplier Number]
,               'The Legacy Companies' as [Supplier Name]
FROM            M3.MITTRA MT
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster as IM on IM.[Item Number] = MT.ITNO
WHERE           1=1
AND             TRTP = 'D96'
AND             TTYP = '10'
GROUP BY        RIDN, RIDL, RIDX, TRPR, ITNO
,               IM.Weight, IM.[Aligned Item Number], IM.[Description]
,               IM.Subcategory, IM.Category, IM.[Product Line], IM.[Sub-Brand], IM.Brand, IM.[Finance Brand]
,               IM.[Business Unit], IM.Division, [Item Type], [Manufactured or Purchased], Status, [FOB Cost]
,               [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate], [Estimated Landed Cost], [Aligned Item Description]
,               TRDT, WHLO
*/
